primary_composite.source: Derived (PMID:23440502, Edelmann JAMA 2013: primary endpoint was diastolic function E/e' ratio, not MACE; ACM/HF-hosp events too sparse for reliable Cox HR in n=422; HR 1.00 used as conservative placeholder with wide CI 0.50-2.00; requires clinician review before use in MACE meta-analysis)

acm.source: Derived (PMID:23440502, Edelmann JAMA 2013: ACM events very sparse in n=422, mean age 67; HR 1.00 with wide CI 0.50-2.00 is a conservative placeholder; event count not separately reported with CI in primary paper; requires clinician review)

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: HR 1.00, very wide CI reflecting sparse events; PMID:23440502 does not separately report CV death with CI; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: HR 1.00, very wide CI reflecting sparse events; PMID:23440502 does not separately report non-CV death; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: typical spironolactone +0.2 mmol/L; PMID:23440502 reports potassium increase but does not give mean change with SD in main paper; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: ~3 mmHg SBP reduction consistent with ALDO-DHF JAMA 2013 supplementary; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: modest eGFR dip with spironolactone; PMID:23440502 does not report delta-eGFR in main text; placeholder for clinician review)
